name: Compare As Table
description: This block displays compare products as table. First card will not display the prices and its button will be white with custom link

fields.name: rows
fields.description: Author this block using the row/column table structure documented in the sidekick block page and its examples.

usageNotes: products: avfree/1/1, avpm/1/1 SaveText: 0% OFF – this will be displayed on the right of the price
Documented sample names: Compare Product Cards.
ambiguityNotes: This entry was expanded from the sidekick block docs and local source file path, but the exact authoring table/row structure should still be taken from the documented examples when generating DOCX content.
